title: karpatiosorbus andreanszkyana
intro: Karpatiosorbus andreanszkyana, a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, is also known as Hungarian rowan or Sorbus andrei. The plant's bark, leaves, and fruits have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus andreanszkyana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antiviral activity, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
